DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-28-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT SSC OAKLAND FRUITVALE OPERATING COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. The allegations fail to allege recklessness. See Mack v. Soung (2000) 80 Cal. App. 4th 966, 972-973. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
